raw_result.description: All-in-one customer service platform with AI chatbot, live chat, ticketing, and call center features.
raw_result.auth_notes: The gathered browser evidence reached LiveAgent's API landing area and related developer/changelog properties, but did not capture a readable first-party authentication page or explicit auth scheme text. A nonstandard developer/app token scheme may exist, but the exact documented API auth methods were not verified from readable page content in this pass.
raw_result.gating_reason: LiveAgent's official pricing page states a 30-day free trial with no credit card required, indicating self-serve trial access.

api_surface.breadth: Official API marketing/docs pages are present, but this pass only verified a general API offering and did not extract endpoint-level breadth details from stable readable technical docs.
api_surface.mcp_notes: The gathered evidence included an official LiveAgent changelog reference mentioning MCP (Model Context Protocol), indicating an official MCP-related offering exists, but the exact canonical MCP documentation page was not captured in readable detail in this pass.

raw_result.blocker: Public API presence and self-serve trial are evident, but the exact documented API authentication method(s) and technical breadth were not captured from stable first-party doc text in this pass.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No explicit rate-limit information was captured from first-party readable page content in this pass.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official pricing and API pages exist on LiveAgent domains; browser notes also surfaced developer/changelog properties and an MCP mention, suggesting active platform/integration investment.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Structured fields auth_methods, api_surface breadth detail, and MCP support detail were not fully supported by readable first-party page text captured in this pass; evidence was partial and some developer pages appeared thin or indirect.
